title: Netherlands Private Limited Company Formation (Besloten Vennootschap, BV)
description: Form a Dutch private limited company — a besloten vennootschap (BV) — by notarial deed of incorporation and registration in the Business Register (Handelsregister), on behalf of the Netherlands Chamber of Commerce (Kamer van Koophandel, KVK). This is the Dutch analogue to gb/companies-house/company-incorporation-in01, ie/cro/company-incorporation, ca/on/registration/business-incorporation, us/ca/sos/business-entity-llc-formation, au/asic/proprietary-company-registration, de/handelsregister/gmbh-formation-musterprotokoll, and fr/inpi/sasu-or-eurl-formation, distinct from nl/kvk/sole-proprietorship-registration-eenmanszaak (which covers only the one-owner eenmanszaak, not a legal entity with separate legal personality). A BV must be incorporated by a notarial deed (oprichtingsakte) before a civil-law notary (§ 2:175 Burgerlijk Wetboek Boek 2, BW2); the deed and its annexed articles of association (statuten) are then filed with KVK, which enters the BV in the Handelsregister — the BV acquires legal personality on execution of the deed (§ 2:175 lid 2 BW2), but third parties acting on its behalf before Handelsregister registration remain personally liable until the company ratifies their acts (§ 2:203 BW2). Scoped to the simplest case: a single founder who is also the BV's sole shareholder and sole managing director (bestuurder), mirroring the single-founder scope already used for de/handelsregister/gmbh-formation-musterprotokoll. Out of scope: multi-founder/multi-shareholder incorporations, a monistic board (one-tier board with executive and non-executive directors, only relevant once a BV has more than one bestuurder), a supervisory board (raad van commissarissen), non-cash (in-kind) capital contributions, a naamloze vennootschap (NV, the public-company sibling also covered by KVK Formulier 3), and the separate post-incorporation UBO (Ultimate Beneficial Owner) filing in KVK's UBO-register (KVK Formulier 30) and Belastingdienst tax registration, neither of which this document models. It does not submit anything or imply government endorsement.

authority.name: Netherlands Chamber of Commerce, via a Dutch civil-law notary

source.documentRef: KVK Formulier 3 ('Besloten vennootschap of naamloze vennootschap inschrijven', March 2026 edition) and KVK Formulier 11 ('Functionarissen van een rechtspersoon inschrijven', December 2025 edition); Burgerlijk Wetboek Boek 2, Titel 5, §§ 2:175, 2:178, 2:186, 2:191, 2:203

verification.notes: GOV-1157 'GovSchema Standard Research' research cycle: a catalog audit found every gap named in the issue's own notes (DE Steuer-ID, SG NRIC loss/damage + re-registration, NZ RealMe, remaining voter registration) already closed in prior cycles (GOV-651, GOV-634, GOV-641, GOV-660, and the GOV-1043/1075/1121/1150 voter-registration sequence) — those notes are stale. The real open gap, flagged by the GOV-1136 cycle that authored de/handelsregister/gmbh-formation-musterprotokoll, was that nl/kvk/sole-proprietorship-registration-eenmanszaak covers only the sole-trader form, not a true limited-liability company (Business Formation's 'LLC' analogue). Authored directly from KVK's own downloadable Formulier 3 and Formulier 11 AcroForm PDFs (both retrieved with a direct, unblocked fetch from production-site-nl.kvk.bloomreach.cloud and extracted in full — text layer plus getFieldObjects()/getAnnotations() — with pdfjs-dist), cross-checked against BW2 Titel 5's own numbered articles for the notarial-deed and legal-personality rules the KVK forms themselves do not state. Programmatically checked every AcroForm annotation's Required flag on both PDFs (131 fields on Formulier 3, 157 on Formulier 11): none set the PDF's own Required bit, the same pattern already documented for nl/kvk/sole-proprietorship-registration-eenmanszaak — this document's required/requiredWhen assignments therefore reflect the forms' own prose instructions and standard registration necessity, not a confirmed submission-time gate. A mock conformance/nl/kvk/bv-formation/1.0.0/application-packet.json test run (single-founder BV, home-address-as-visiting-address, wholesale-only, EUR 1 nominal paid-up capital under the post-Flex-BV regime), checked with a from-scratch script re-implementing the schema's own required/requiredWhen condition grammar, passed with 0 violations across 34 fields; a mutation test confirmed the continuingExistingBusiness and soleShareholderSinceDate requiredWhen gates both fire correctly. Status remains 'draft' pending independent field-by-field re-review and a live-notary/kvk.nl portal walkthrough (no such live wizard exists for this notarial process); see VERIFICATION.md for the full source table and out-of-scope list.

fields.name: registrationType
fields.label: Are you registering a new BV, or continuing an existing business or establishment as a BV?
fields.description: Determines which start-date and prior-business fields apply. 'Continuing' means an existing business or establishment is taken over (e.g. by purchase) and carried on as a BV, distinct from incorporating one from scratch.
fields.sourceRef: Formulier 3, §1.1: 'Ik start een nieuwe bv.' / 'Ik zet een bestaande onderneming of vestiging voort als bv.'

fields.name: startDate
fields.label: Start date of the BV
fields.description: Usually the date the BV begins helping customers, though earlier registration is sometimes necessary (e.g. to request quotes).
fields.sourceRef: Formulier 3, §1.1: 'Startdatum van de bv of nv:'

fields.name: existingBusinessName
fields.label: Name of the existing business or establishment being taken over
fields.sourceRef: Formulier 3, §1.1: 'De naam van de onderneming of vestiging is:'

fields.name: existingBusinessLocation
fields.label: Location of the existing business or establishment being taken over
fields.sourceRef: Formulier 3, §1.1: 'De vestigingsplaats van de onderneming of vestiging is:'

fields.name: existingBusinessKvkNumber
fields.label: KVK number of the existing business or establishment
fields.sourceRef: Formulier 3, §1.1: 'Het KVK-nummer is:'

fields.name: continuationDate
fields.label: Date of continuation of the business or establishment
fields.description: The date on the signed takeover contract, when the BV takes over the business or establishment.
fields.sourceRef: Formulier 3, §1.1: 'De datum van voortzetting van de onderneming of vestiging is:'

fields.name: originalEstablishmentDate
fields.label: Original start date of the business or establishment in the Business Register
fields.description: If unknown, KVK enters it instead, so this field is never required even on the continuation path.
fields.sourceRef: Formulier 3, §1.1: 'De eerste startdatum van de onderneming of vestiging in het Handelsregister is... Als u de datum niet kent, vult KVK die in.'

fields.name: companyName
fields.label: Name of the BV as stated in the articles of association
fields.description: Copied from the statuten (articles of association) annexed to the notarial deed of incorporation, including the mandatory 'B.V.' legal-form suffix.
fields.sourceRef: Formulier 3, §2.1: 'De naam van de bv of nv zoals vermeld in de statuten is:'

fields.name: registeredSeat
fields.label: Registered seat (statutaire zetel) of the BV
fields.description: The Dutch municipality that is the BV's statutory seat, copied from the articles of association. Distinct from the visiting address (businessVisitingAddress).
fields.sourceRef: Formulier 3, §2.1: 'De zetel van de bv of nv zoals vermeld in de statuten is:'

fields.name: incorporationDeedDate
fields.label: Date of the deed of incorporation (akte van oprichting)
fields.description: The date the notary executes the deed. The BV acquires legal personality on this date (§ 2:175 lid 2 BW2).
fields.sourceRef: Formulier 3, §2.1: 'Datum van de akte van oprichting is:'; § 2:175 lid 2 BW2

fields.name: effectiveDate
fields.label: Date of effect, if different from the deed date
fields.sourceRef: Formulier 3, §2.1: 'De datum van ingang is (als die afwijkt van de datum van de akte van oprichting):'

fields.name: issuedCapitalAmount
fields.label: Issued capital (geplaatst kapitaal) of the BV
fields.description: Since the 2012 Flex-BV reform there is no statutory minimum issued-capital amount for a BV (unlike the pre-2012 requirement of EUR 18,000); the amount is fixed only by the articles of association.
fields.sourceRef: Formulier 3, §3.1: 'Wat is het geplaatste kapitaal van de bv?'; the pre-2012 EUR 18,000 minimum was abolished by the Wet vereenvoudiging en flexibilisering bv-recht (Flex-BV Act)

fields.name: issuedCapitalCurrency
fields.label: Currency of the issued capital
fields.sourceRef: Formulier 3, §3: 'Geef daarbij aan om welke munteenheid het gaat (valuta).'

fields.name: paidUpCapitalAmount
fields.label: Paid-up capital (gestort kapitaal) of the BV
fields.description: Must be paid up in full before or at incorporation for a cash contribution; may be as low as one eurocent under the Flex-BV regime.
fields.sourceRef: Formulier 3, §3.2: 'Wat is het gestorte kapitaal van de bv?'

fields.name: paidUpCapitalCurrency
fields.label: Currency of the paid-up capital
fields.sourceRef: Formulier 3, §3: 'Geef daarbij aan om welke munteenheid het gaat (valuta).'

fields.name: primaryTradeName
fields.label: Trade name
fields.description: The trade name (handelsnaam) the BV uses to do business, written first if there is more than one.
fields.sourceRef: Formulier 3, §5.1: 'Eén naam. De handelsnaam is:'

fields.name: hasAdditionalTradeNames
fields.label: Does the BV have more than one trade name?
fields.sourceRef: Formulier 3, §5.1: 'Heeft de bv of nv één of meer handelsnamen?'

fields.name: additionalTradeNames
fields.label: Additional trade names
fields.sourceRef: Formulier 3, §5.1: 'Meer namen. De handelsnamen zijn:'

fields.name: businessActivities
fields.label: Activities of the BV
fields.description: Description of the BV's current activities, products, and services — not planned future activities. KVK uses this to assign one or more SBI (Standard Industrial Classification) codes.
fields.sourceRef: Formulier 3, §5.2: 'Welke activiteiten voert de bv of nv uit?'

fields.name: mainBusinessActivity
fields.label: Main activity of the BV
fields.sourceRef: Formulier 3, §5.3: 'Wat is de belangrijkste activiteit van de bv of nv?'

fields.name: sellsToConsumersRetail
fields.label: Does the BV sell products to consumers (retail)?
fields.sourceRef: Formulier 3, §5.4: 'Verkoopt de bv of nv producten aan andere consumenten (detailhandel)?'

fields.name: retailInShop
fields.label: Sells in a shop
fields.sourceRef: Formulier 3, §5.4: 'In een winkel.'

fields.name: retailAtMarket
fields.label: Sells at a market
fields.sourceRef: Formulier 3, §5.4: 'Op de markt.'

fields.name: retailViaStreetTrading
fields.label: Sells via street trading
fields.sourceRef: Formulier 3, §5.4: 'Via straathandel.'

fields.name: retailViaInternet
fields.label: Sells via the internet
fields.sourceRef: Formulier 3, §5.4: 'Via internet.'

fields.name: retailFromHome
fields.label: Sells from home
fields.sourceRef: Formulier 3, §5.4: 'Vanuit huis.'

fields.name: retailOtherChannel
fields.label: Sells via another channel not listed
fields.sourceRef: Formulier 3, §5.4: 'Anders:'

fields.name: retailOtherChannelDescription
fields.label: Description of the other sales channel
fields.sourceRef: Formulier 3, §5.4: 'Anders:' free-text channel description

fields.name: sellsWholesale
fields.label: Does the BV sell products to other businesses or legal entities (wholesale)?
fields.sourceRef: Formulier 3, §5.5: 'Verkoopt de bv of nv producten aan andere ondernemingen of rechtspersonen (groothandel)?'

fields.name: importsGoods
fields.label: Does the BV import products from abroad?
fields.sourceRef: Formulier 3, §5.6: 'Voert de bv of nv producten in vanuit het buitenland (import)?'

fields.name: exportsGoods
fields.label: Does the BV export products abroad?
fields.sourceRef: Formulier 3, §5.7: 'Voert de bv of nv producten uit naar het buitenland (export)?'

fields.name: businessVisitingAddress
fields.label: Visiting address of the BV
fields.description: The address of the BV's principal establishment. Cannot be a PO Box. If not the same as a director's home address, proof of the right to use the address (e.g. rental agreement, proof of ownership, or a declaration of consent) may be required.
fields.sourceRef: Formulier 3, §5.8: 'Wat is het bezoekadres van de bv of nv?'

fields.name: hasDifferentPostalAddress
fields.label: Is the postal address different from the visiting address?
fields.sourceRef: Formulier 3, §5.9: 'Heeft de bv of nv een ander postadres dan het bezoekadres?'

fields.name: businessPostalAddress
fields.label: Postal address of the BV
fields.description: May be a PO Box address, unlike the visiting address.
fields.sourceRef: Formulier 3, §5.9: 'Ja, het postadres, postbusadres of postbusnummer is:'

fields.name: businessPhoneNumber1
fields.label: Telephone number 1
fields.description: Not published in the Business Register.
fields.sourceRef: Formulier 3, §5.10: 'Telefoonnummer 1:'

fields.name: businessPhoneNumber2
fields.label: Telephone number 2
fields.sourceRef: Formulier 3, §5.10: 'Telefoonnummer 2:'

fields.name: businessWebsiteUrl
fields.label: Website (URL)
fields.sourceRef: Formulier 3, §5.10: 'Internetadres (website):'

fields.name: businessEmailAddress
fields.label: Business email address
fields.sourceRef: Formulier 3, §5.10: 'E-mailadres:'

fields.name: employeeCount15PlusHoursPerWeek
fields.label: Number of people who work 15 hours or more per week
fields.description: Includes directors, employees, hired and temporary workers, and other persons (e.g. family members) working at the principal establishment.
fields.sourceRef: Formulier 3, §5.11: 'Aantal personen dat 15 uur of meer werkt per week:'

fields.name: employeeCountUnder15HoursPerWeek
fields.label: Number of people who work less than 15 hours per week
fields.sourceRef: Formulier 3, §5.11: 'Aantal personen dat minder dan 15 uur werkt per week:'

fields.name: allowMarketingUseOfAddress
fields.label: May sellers use the BV's visiting and postal address for marketing (unsolicited advertising)?
fields.description: If declined, KVK records on the Business Register extract that sellers may not use the BV's address for marketing purposes.
fields.sourceRef: Formulier 3, §6.1: 'Mogen verkopers het bezoekadres en postadres van de bv of nv in het Handelsregister gebruiken?'

fields.name: hiresOutEmployeesForPayment
fields.label: Does the BV sometimes hire out employees to other businesses or legal entities for payment?
fields.description: Triggers a notification obligation under the Wet Waadi (Wet allocatie arbeidskrachten door intermediairs). Answer 'no' if hiring out employees is itself one of the BV's activities (e.g. a staffing agency) — that case is described under businessActivities instead.
fields.sourceRef: Formulier 3, §7.1: 'Leent de bv of nv soms medewerkers tegen betaling uit aan ondernemingen of rechtspersonen?'

fields.name: directorLastName
fields.label: Managing director (bestuurder) — last name
fields.description: This document scopes to a single managing director, who is also the sole founder and sole shareholder.
fields.sourceRef: Formulier 11, §3.1: 'Achternaam:'

fields.name: directorFirstNames
fields.label: Managing director — first name(s)
fields.sourceRef: Formulier 11, §3.1: 'Voornaam of voornamen (voluit):'

fields.name: directorCitizenServiceNumber
fields.label: Managing director — citizen service number (BSN)
fields.description: Found on a Dutch passport, ID card, or driving licence. Left blank if the director has no BSN.
fields.sourceRef: Formulier 11, §3.1: 'U moet het burgerservicenummer (BSN) van de functionaris doorgeven ... Heeft de functionaris geen BSN? Dan vult u daar niets in.'

fields.name: directorDateOfBirth
fields.label: Managing director — date of birth
fields.sourceRef: Formulier 11, §3.1: 'Geboortedatum:'

fields.name: directorPlaceOfBirth
fields.label: Managing director — place of birth
fields.sourceRef: Formulier 11, §3.1: 'Geboorteplaats:'

fields.name: directorCountryOfBirth
fields.label: Managing director — country of birth
fields.sourceRef: Formulier 11, §3.1: 'Geboorteland:'

fields.name: directorGender
fields.label: Managing director — gender
fields.sourceRef: Formulier 11, §3.1: 'Geslacht: Man / Vrouw / Anders'

fields.name: directorHomeAddress
fields.label: Managing director — home address
fields.sourceRef: Formulier 11, §3.1: 'Woonadres:'

fields.name: directorResidesOutsideNetherlands
fields.label: Does the managing director live outside the Netherlands?
fields.description: Gates the proof-of-address document requirement. A director resident in the Netherlands must instead have the correct address registered in the Basisregistratie Personen (BRP) before this form can be processed.
fields.sourceRef: Formulier 11, §3.1: 'Woont de functionaris in het buitenland? Dan moet u een bewijs van het woonadres toevoegen aan dit formulier.'

fields.name: directorIsSoleShareholder
fields.label: Is the managing director also the sole shareholder (enig aandeelhouder)?
fields.description: This document scopes only to the single-founder case where the managing director and the sole shareholder are the same person, matching the scoping already used for de/handelsregister/gmbh-formation-musterprotokoll.
fields.sourceRef: Formulier 11, §3.2/3.3: 'Alleen enig aandeelhouder ... Is de bestuurder ook enig aandeelhouder?'

fields.name: soleShareholderSinceDate
fields.label: Sole shareholder since
fields.sourceRef: Formulier 11, §3.3: 'Ja, enig aandeelhouder vanaf:'

fields.name: directorAuthorityType
fields.label: Managing director's authority (bevoegdheid) under the articles of association
fields.description: Constrained to sole authority (alleen bevoegd): with exactly one managing director (this document's scope), joint authority (gezamenlijk bevoegd, requiring a co-signing officer) or no authority (niet bevoegd) do not apply.
fields.sourceRef: Formulier 11, §3.4: 'Wat is de bevoegdheid van de bestuurder volgens de statuten? Niet bevoegd. / Alleen bevoegd. / Gezamenlijk bevoegd.'

fields.name: directorHasTitle
fields.label: Does the managing director hold a title (e.g. director, president)?
fields.description: A title may be described in the articles of association or set on appointment; a director or commissioner need not have one.
fields.sourceRef: Formulier 11, §3.5: 'Heeft de bestuurder of commissaris een titel?'

fields.name: directorTitle
fields.label: Managing director's title
fields.sourceRef: Formulier 11, §3.5: 'Ja, de titel is:'

fields.name: directorStartDate
fields.label: Date the managing director started
fields.description: May be in the future.
fields.sourceRef: Formulier 11, §3.6: 'Op welke datum is de functionaris gestart?'

fields.name: signerLastNameAndInitials
fields.label: Signer — last name and initial(s)
fields.description: Only a managing director of the BV or a notary may sign the registration filing. By signing, the signer declares that all information entered is correct and that they are authorised to sign on behalf of the BV.
fields.sourceRef: Formulier 3, §8.1: 'Achternaam en voorletter(s):'; 'Alleen één van de volgende personen mag het formulier ondertekenen: Eén van de bestuurders van de bv of nv. / Een notaris.'

fields.name: signerEmail
fields.label: Signer — email address
fields.sourceRef: Formulier 3, §8.1: 'E-mailadres:'

fields.name: signerPhoneNumber
fields.label: Signer — telephone number
fields.sourceRef: Formulier 3, §8.1: 'Telefoonnummer:'

fields.name: signingDate
fields.label: Signing date
fields.sourceRef: Formulier 3, §8.1: 'Datum van ondertekenen:'

documents.label: Copy of the BV's articles of association (statuten)
documents.sourceRef: Formulier 3, Uitleg 2: 'Voeg een exemplaar van de statuten toe aan dit formulier.'

documents.label: Executed notarial deed of incorporation (akte van oprichting)
documents.sourceRef: § 2:175 BW2 — a BV is incorporated by notarial deed

documents.label: Signer's valid proof of identity
documents.sourceRef: Formulier 3, §8: 'KVK heeft een kopie van een geldig identiteitsbewijs nodig van de bestuurder die dit formulier ondertekent.'

documents.label: Managing director's valid proof of identity
documents.sourceRef: Formulier 11, §3.6: 'KVK heeft een kopie van een geldig identiteitsbewijs van de functionaris nodig.'

documents.label: Proof of the managing director's foreign home address
documents.sourceRef: Formulier 11, §3.1: 'Woont de functionaris in het buitenland, dan moet u een bewijs van het woonadres toevoegen aan dit formulier.'

documents.label: Proof that the managing director is the sole shareholder
documents.sourceRef: Formulier 11, §3.2: 'Alleen enig aandeelhouder ... U moet hiervan bewijs toevoegen aan dit formulier.'

documents.label: Signer's handwritten signature
documents.statement: The signer (a managing director or the notary) must sign the registration filing with a handwritten signature, not a copy or scan.
documents.sourceRef: Formulier 3, §8.1: 'Handtekening met pen (geen kopie of scan):'

documents.label: Managing director's handwritten signature
documents.statement: The managing director must sign the functionaris filing with a handwritten signature, not a copy or scan.
documents.sourceRef: Formulier 11, §3.6: 'Handtekening met pen van de functionaris (geen kopie of scan):'

steps.title: Name, seat, and capital of the BV
Trade names and activities of the BV
